title: KYC/AML customer onboarding
narrative: Automate onboarding screening: OCR identity documents, screen applicants against sanctions and PEP lists, and compute a weighted risk score with an approve/review/reject decision. Sanitized restatement — no raw applicant values present.

mode.rationale: Interdependent modules with declared interfaces (OCR feeds screening feeds scoring) — build mode.

acceptance_criteria.text: Every applicant is screened against the sanctions list
Risk score is a weighted sum of sanctions, PEP, and geography signals
Applicants with a sanctions hit are never auto-approved

attachments.summary: Customer data-handling policy: client names and document numbers must never leave the boundary.
